# scrapedoctl

Scrape.do CLI & MCP Server. Bridging AI agents and the web with anti-bot bypassing and persistent caching.

## Main Tools

- **`scrape_url`**: Primary tool for AI agents. Scrapes any URL to optimized Markdown.
  - `url`: target URL (required)
  - `render`: enable JS rendering (optional)
  - `super`: use residential proxies (optional)
  - `geoCode`: target country (optional)
  - `session`: sticky session ID (optional)
  - `device`: emulate desktop/mobile/tablet (optional)
  - `actions`: browser actions like clicks/scrolling (optional)

## Command Line Interface

- `scrapedoctl install`: Interactive setup for AI agents.
- `scrapedoctl repl`: Interactive scraping shell.
- `scrapedoctl history <url>`: View previous versions.
- `scrapedoctl cache stats`: Cache metrics.
- `scrapedoctl metadata`: JSON representation of the tool.
- `scrapedoctl completion <shell>`: Generate completion for bash, zsh, fish, or powershell (native module).
